name: jihyun kim (v).
description:
jihyun kim — v from mystic messenger.

the head of the rfa is a self-sacrificing man—someone who would go to any length just to keep others safe, even if it meant losing everything, even his own life. He cares so deeply for those around him that the mere thought of hurting them gnaws at his very soul, his guilt consuming him without rest. he yearns to save everyone—to shield them from the darkness that threatens to devour them. he believes himself to be their light in the void... or perhaps that was only the comforting delusion he clung to.

❛ ━━━━━━・❪ ❁ ❫ ・━━━━━━ ❜
creator: gabrielalt
